star_1.text: Honestly, I absolutely loved this game before the recent reboot. I really loved the event rooms. Since the complete makeover of the game not long ago, too many things were taken away. There are less rooms, less quests, no challenge room, no costume bonuses, no costume shards, and no events. I can only hope that the developers are working on reestablishing these features in a future update and that the makeover wasn't the full game. Otherwise, I might delete the game. The best parts were removed.

played this game some time ago. enjoyed it. I'd bought/earned lots of costumes. imagine my dismay when I began playing again to discover with the change in format that all my costumes/upgrades were gone! since they changed the game from the jelly lab format, I wasted a bunch of money! there should be some way to get the costumes I'd purchased or earned back. very disappointed in the developers. I understand upgrading the game etc, but it's crazy to rip off those who had played before

The old game was great. I do not know what the devs were thinking to change up the game and toss everything everyone had worked and/or paid for over the past 5 years. I am not happy with the new minion abilities at all. I miss my old minions' abilities and costumes. BTW, to make such a dramatic change without any warning to your loyal customers/players is a great disservice to them. No wonder I see so many comments of folks choosing to leave the game forever. Makes one feel they have absolutely wasted their money and time (yeah, I know. Any game is a time waster but many folks put effort to grow their accounts to what they were and now poof, all gone. Grr.) If you choose to play this game as it is, I suggest not putting a single cent into it, lest you plan on having it flushed down the drain in short order.

Not impressed with the new upgrade. Don't like how I lost so much progress. I made in app purchases which were lost. I had earned several characters and now I have to earn them back! Special missions are more difficult. I had earned characters which collected a lot of items and now I collect a lot less. It costs a lot more for special fever upgrades. And there are less challenges during special missions to collect more items. Not happy!!

Like the game, but when an update wiped my progress as well as remove the stuff that I paid for; their tech support was to difficult to work right and if I 1 thing wrong, I had to start the 5 page questionnaire again. After the third time, I just gave up a call the money, almost $200 worth, a lost and uninstalled the game. Because obviously they don't care about the customers enough to make things easy like other companies do!

Since the new update in 2025, I have not played it due to the lagging response of the controls and poorly designed graphics. Also, now that each costume does NOTHING, the game has become boring. I do launch the game once in a while in hopes of an update that would revert the game back to the previous version. But we all know that won't happen due to so-called "progress." I will not be playing the game anytime soon. I do feel terrible for those that spent money on the now worthless costumes.

This was always my go-to game during short breaks. It seems that this anniversary update has all but wiped out all the progress that I had. All the 5 million+ banana are gone. My tokens are there but all the minions I collected don't seem be there. As well as all the upgrades that I either purchased or earned! Where is the Golden shield that I actually paid money to purchase? How about all the score multipliers that I worked hard to gain? And all the achievements? I started playing this game shortly after it was released and this latest update ruined it all by resetting everything that everyone enjoyed about it. Please bring back the old version!

This game used to be so much fun! Why'd you have to go ruin everything?? I HATE the new updates! All my bananas are gone, and you saved zero of my progress! I used to love this game, but it's so disappointing what happened to it! I will never be playing a Gameloft game again!!! Not to mention, the new update is super hard to navigate. I used to always look forward to playing this game, but oh well. It's time to find another game. All of my past progress is gone. What a rip off! And Gameloft, I really don't care! Your probably lying in that reply. I'm still not buying any more games from you. Complete rip off!

I agree with what mostly everybody is saying when we say that this game used to be more fun before the update, and now this game is more bland and boring. The characters are harder to unlock, the bananas are almost considered usless, and I feel like all that was great with this game were taken away. For example, BRING BACK THE MINION GAMES!! The minion games were super fun, where you could battle against other players. But now, all we get are missions where it cost energy and tickets to play.

This game was so great back then but now it's terrible. There used to be like 20 locations but now there's like 4. Unlocking minions is just confusing and they don't have abilities anymore. Also the ads are just annoying. I get ads even when I'm on the menu. Also I hate that I can't play offline anymore. I'm going to uninstall it for now.

They removed the Jelly Jar minion, and the agent mode, removing one of the main reasons I played this game while also discarding most of the levels, it used to be one of there best games, but I don't play it a much anymore, another bad thing is that there isn't any invincibility frames after a power-up completes and a lot of the time I am doing good in a run and it just stops REGISTERING INPUTS, which on its own speaks for itself but sometimes the music doesn't work, but the minion sfx does.

This used to be a fun game, until the update. No costume boosts or mission requirements (which enhanced each other) badly designed game control that stops responding at critical times, lost all the locations, bosses, side-quests,etc. And the ads - spend three times as much time on ads as on gameplay! It's basically turned into a pay-to-play or we'll kill you with ads. Looking at the milquetoast responses from the devs, it's clear this is what they want. Gonna drop this game for good

Very disappointed in this new update. It took away the whole point of the game to progress, earn, and unlock new things. Now it's just endless runs with no incentives- already had with the top banana room. I'm honestly very disappointed that a game I loved & spent far too much time playing is garbage now. Costumes no longer have any value and I'm being forced to unlock all the locations over again. so much progress flushed down the drain. There is no longer any incentive to play- will delete.

Horrible!! why don't you bring back the very first version of the game, the one where you go against other people's high scores, where you can grow your despicable multiplier to get higher scores, where you had to do despicable missions in order to get higher score multiplier. That was the whole point of the game, what you've done with it is truly despicable (ironically).

This game had a simple way to play the game but nope, the developers had to go and ruin it. I can at least let it slide with how overblown the UI menu is with the events, rewards, daily spins, ads, & ect. But the second an ad played in the middle of a run, I immediately uninstalled. That is the worst way to go about ads. This game is years old & you couldn't bother to play the ads AFTER I was done with the run. It's scummy with the ads already but this is a new low, I can't stand this stuff.

I've been playing this game for over 4years & this new update is horrible all the tokens, bananas, & COSTUMES I've ever purchased are gone I've paid out of pocket several times over the years because I loved & enjoyed this game but this new update forces you to start over you can't even navigate when you open the game it starts you on a run and nothing is saved, really think its time I move on if this isn't fixed.😭😠

I use to love the game, paid actual money for permanent upgrades, downloaded all levels, strived to get all fruits in each map, it was amazing. The game is ruined now, took a break from it to come back and found out it's a completely different game from the one I loved a couple years ago, changed for the worst and it seem like the tutorials never end, will b stepping away from the game for good or at least until the creators see the error in their way and restore the game to ALL its former glory.

I am a big fan of minion rush, and while I was bit worried to play the new update, turns out I can't even experience it as whenever I go through the tutorial part of claiming my reward at the hall of jam, the reward dissepars and I can't claim it, essentially making me stuck on that screen and not being able to move on forward with the rest of the game. I can now no longer play the game and I hope this gets fixed

Ads and more Ads. This game used to be good. They have changed the game mechanics, minions, and have monetized the game at every turn. The Ads are extremely long, the rewards are not worth viewing the ads. If you don't want to watch the Ads you can pay to skip a limited amount of Ads or pay for every thing else. This game has been ruined by greed and now is essentially a P2P You will either spend $$$ or waste tons of time with ads basically for everything which they make money on every view.

I used to play this game constantly. they upgraded it and now it sucks. there are ads constantly it is completely different and it is so busy it's hard to follow and understand what is going on. I really hope they go back with all these negative reviews but it seems like it's just a money grab. we also can't play offline to just run anymore it all has to be these crazy events. sometimes simpler is better. hopefully they can fix it, I'll try again later but till then it's a no for me.

star_2.text: Not as good as it used 2 be! I played a few years ago & loved it. I played so much I had 2 quit 4 awhile. I installed it recently 2 play again and it is so different. I miss 1 on 1 competitions & the costumes that had special powers. I paid alot 4 them. I also miss the bosses, and extra areas u could go 2, like hitting moons 2 run on the moon. I would love 4 these 2 come back. I don't like the ads, u used 2 be able to pay & not have them. I wish it could b like it was & add new locations/runs.

Absolutely loved this game - before it updated and completely reset everything and made me start from the very beginning. I played for three years, so you can imagine how much progress I lost. All of it. Levels, costumes, coins, areas, everything. I'm very pissed. to say the absolute least. I hate the new version. This update was extremely unnecessary and there was zero demand for it!! 😡😡😡

the ads are horrendous. it's one thing to have an add after playing. it's another to have an add after collecting your reward or changing your costume. can't even go in different menus before getting an add. I even got an add after updating my settings. I like the game in general, but the random laggy spikes and tons of ads is making it very disappointing. I really miss when this game came out years ago where it was just fun

it was way better before the update. they've made it abundantly clear they have no intention of going back or giving us the old game in any form. the graphics are obnoxious, the perspective is off so that it's harder to get timing right, and the obstacles are often impossible to pass forcing players to watch more ads for without the entertainment value of choosing between and playing different missions. I'd watch more ads if they made the game better, but it's just worse with more ads.

this used to be an awesome game before you removed the most basic functions the game used to have, mainly it was an INFINITE runner, where you didn't have to unlock maps (although you had to make it to a map change section.) The game didn't stop you run because you finished your task. You could run an infinite amount of times ( didn't have to wait for the tickets/energy/what-ever-you-call-it to replenish.) and there were BOSS FIGHTS! So far all i can say isthat the game lost its charm.

I have been playing this game on and off for it's 5 year run. Seeing this new update and other reviews about the update I have to agree that it is horrible. The whole point of the game was the unlimited times you could run. It wasn't so mission heavy. It was just simple fun. Also, nothing saved from previous game play. Very disappointing. Not a game I'll continue playing.

I used to absolutely love this game, but it has changed, and not for the better. It might be because I just started the game, but I don't like it much now. I love the graphics, but it stops you after the mission is done, so you can't really do as much. For example, a recent mission of mine was to jump over five objects. 30 seconds in, I junp five times and it kicks me out. You can't really challenge yourself as much. I suggest playing Temple Run or Subway Surfers instead. Same idea but more fun.

Ads are getting more and more abusive. There is no reason for ads to go on for well over a minute or two and still be forced to click through additional screens before being able to resume your game. Only way to enjoy the game without constant ad harassment is to pay for ad removal, which to its credit is a one time purchase.

I love to play this game but ever since the update (May 2025) the game is kind of boring now. All my progress has been erased, costume abilities have been removed which I am really sad to see because the px-41 serum was my favorite ability. Not to mention the fact that there are no more missions to do. It's just infinite running now. I mean, I love the new graphics but the game has lost its spark with this update.

I decided to download it after not playing it for years, only to be met with disappointment. The game functions relatively fine, but if the signal drops in the slightest, then reactions are delayed, which causes me to bump into something. I also don't like the fact that I get put in daily tournaments just for hitting a minion to get more points. The ads also ruin the experience by performing very slowly. I can't run without rewards constantly popping up, which also crashes the game and ruins it

Why did you ruin it? I was fine with the 15 to 30 second ads. Been playing for months & I'm in the top 100%. Always get the pass, loved the game until the last update 2/27/26 now ads are over a minute? .... please fix or I'll remove

Used to play this game around 2015 and since then pretty much everything has changed for the worse. It used to be really fun. I remember there were levels and youd have to pass them and defeat bosses. Now it's just a boring highscore. The whole currency thing has changed too and the games just lost its spark. Bring back the old minion rush. They're are so many negative reviews talking about how it has changed and its now terrible yet the developer of the game is doing nothing. Disappointing
It has gotten stuck in ads several times. The entire ad plays, then nothing happens and unable to hit X to advance out.

Sorry - Don't like most of the changes 😕 The game isn't the same without the original missions as you had more to aim for besides running. I find it difficult to navigate to even work out: Are there any missions besides running. Why collect Nana's as what are they used for now? Many levels are no longer featured and the costumes used to be related to their own power ups? Basically the challenge has all gone with nothing fun to aim for. What a shame I shall miss playing it

I used to play this game back in 2020, it was amazing I loved it but when you get to the high level It gets too hard you can't complete missions, fast forward, now it's 2025 and gosh this game changed a lot, in my opinion this game was amazing before 2025 I want them to change this game back to the way it was... I want the OG minion rush not this one that looks like a minion rush from temu.. I honestly don't like the new update, now I can't get past level 1, some people like it but I do not!

As many people have said, the new update isn't near as fun as it used to be, primarily because of the ads. I understand the need for some ads, but it has gone to the extreme level. I'm not ready to delete it yet, but if it continues this way, I will. I have better things to do than spending time watching more ads than gameplay.

I'm being hassled now with notifications reminding me I have not played for a long time. There is a reason for that! The game is now completely boring, sluggish controls, graphics that now even more cartoonish, and the loss of each costume having its own power. SORRY, BUT THE GAME REALLY SUCKS NOW!

My Bananas And Token is Gone I think i want for old version for the minion rush went i'm 8 year old My Father Playing Old Huawei Phone for My Local Minion rush all skins unlocked and season pass but i want for to time i wish have restore my data for minion rush.. 😞🥀

I get that the update was needed for some people, but my son and I used to like playing this game. now you need to be connected to wifi or have your data on at all times when playing this game. I asked if they were going to bring back where you can play it offline again and they said no. Before the update I gave this a 5 star rating. I've changed my mind now and I'm givimg it a 2 star rating
not as fun as it use to be. way to much time wasted on commercials.

star_3.text: PC version needs work. I played the old game on my PC for years and was almost at level 800. Then it wouldn't load. I iinstalled this "updated" version and eagerly began to play. The game pad controls don't work the same, they lag badly at times. And when I used up my free revices and didn't want to pay for more, it kicked me out of the game and so far I haven't figured out how to restart it. It keeps wanting me to re-install it. I'm going to play it on my pc, not my phone

Great but I'm sad. I love that the game is back to where it used to be; pure running, but BETTER! But there's only 4 locations, which is what I'm sad about. I wish we could have Minion Beach, El Macho's Lair, basically ALL of the 14 locations we had throughout the years... Update: The other reviews are onto something. The reaction time is not the best compared to before. It takes too long to move up, down, left and right. End up hitting an obstacle when running so fast because he moves too slow

I miss the old school Minion Rush. The game was just that a rush, just Temple Run. Then all the updates came. No going to lie, I miss having the Despecible multiplier, maxing out the power ups with bananas and the costumes that would give more out of the power up. You were to great your friends out high and your if you kept running. Plus going from location to location wasn't that hard, literally you run for a few and a sign would show up and you had the option to choose. But now it's too much

I loved this game then you updated it and I lost all my progress and it kept saying I would get it back but never did which is really upsetting because I was really far also I hate how we now can only run 5 times and have to wait for more tickets. One of the reasoned I loved this game was because you could play for however long you wanted without having to wait for some type of energy to charge back up. I do like how we can get different costumes and minions without having to buy them that is one good thing about the update.

Like many games, the game was fun when it came out. The game was pay to win before, but the original didn't have powerup upgrades linked to one minion skin. I miss the Jelly Lab and all the resources I had. I can't remember how many ads there were though. After the 5th anniversary update they restructured the game and while I still played it somewhat after that, I lost interest. While I don't hate the game, I wish the game stayed like it was.

I'm seriously considering deleting the game now. Started out tons of fun, but I lost everything I had worked to get when they did their massive update a while back. It keeps saying I'll get it all back, but I don't really care for the way the game plays anymore and it's been ages and it still has me working to earn basic costumes. You used to have an obvious map of where you were going and now there are just locked areas and I don't like playing in the prison FOREVER! Ugh!

What was once a fun game has turned into a chore. Too many levels, too many side games, too many characters, too many game and character upgrades that aren't attainable unless you pay a lot of real money. Also, why does each update require the user to uninstall and reinstall the app? And after you do, why do you have to go through the tutorial before you can login with your saved data?

I don't know what happen to the game. It was previously biggy but now it running smooth. I'll give y'all that. But something wrong with purchasing options. I mean I think it's great that I have access to all the costumes but the banna I collect doesn't even register. What the point of doing that if I have to earn in a prize pod? Good game, just need some improvements. Good graphics smoother gamplay. Great Idea with each suit having it's own power up specialty. But....I can be running for longer than a minute or rather I don't want to if the bannas I collect doesn't register. Maybe make the banna more rare or something? Idk but that needs to be fixed

the game is barely like i remembered from like a few years ago the minions look so unpolished and the menu now looks bad now and it hurts my eyes but most of the other stuff is still mostly the same but everything still looks different from what i remembered when i was a child and its not as unique anymore as also the additional floors are removed too

I love this game, however... I have no sound. Not on my phone nor on my tablet. I have tried everything, it isn't working. I tried contacting the developers, but all I got was a chatbot... So alas, all I can give for now is 3 stars. If they fixed this I would give 5 stars, because the game is fun.

the game is perfect but it is buggy because the internet connection if you can make it full functional offline and bring back old level menu style and enemies that surprise us while running and if you can improve it's graphics or make graphic options for more choices for multiple devices it will be better
gameplay and outfits are good but the problem is it is a bit glitchy and floaty. sometimes the game is stuck in loading. 10s of popups and while claiming it takes 1 whole minute for me......

Heres what I think about the "New Era of Minions" First of all, YOU CANT ROTATE YOUR PHONE TO MOVE DOWN THE SLIDE ANYMORE?? ARE YOU SERIOUS!? Second, Ads are way more frequent which is sad, Third, Its nice you get your old costumes and rubies from before the update I was kind of worried about that, Fourth, Gadgets, really? The powerups were all we needed, Fifth, YOU DONT NEED TO ENABLE VIBRATION ON EVERY BUTTON PRESS WHAT IF ITS LATE AT NIGHT? DAMN

Great gameplay. I just downloaded it again and have been enjoying it. One thing though- the ads. They're such a killer and it ruins the game so much. There is an ad every 30 seconds and it's extremely annoying.

all the fun is gone. like excuse me but wft the whole point of skins are to have unique gadgets, but in the new update THATS JUST GONE FSR . everything got redisigned which looks rather worse than before. there's more ads then ever. and the whole point of the game is gone. WHAT HAPPENED TO UNLOCKABLE AREAS LIKE WHAT. that was the whole lifeblood of the game.

I lost so much progress in minion rush. I lost 132 costumes and 24,000+ and I don't know how to bring them all back. I will tell you what happend. After I saw my iPad after months, I was excited for the massive update but somehow I cannot update. So I deleted the game and reinstalled think that I would still have my progress. but a few weeks later. I lost all of my progress! I didn't know how to get it back! Please help me get my progress back!!!😭

I've played this game since I was 10 years old. I come back, 11 years later, and.. a lot has changed for the worse. In the past, we had a ton of locations and a whole mission based system which was a ton of fun! But now, there's none of that anymore. Now it's just "play daily, grind, pay". The running aspect is still the same (besides changed gadgets and the ability to switch maps DURING the run, which no longer exists), and the engine upgrade is nice. Just unfortunate of the removed content..

I played minion rush years ago and really loved it. It's still a good game, pretty addicting. But the way the missions are set up is really annoying. I miss the free runs. And the amount of downloads that need to be done are ridiculous. Every few days and every few levels you need to download something new or you can't continue playing. In my opinion the game is well on its way to being updated to death. I've de-installed it so I have space on my phone for literally anything at all.

Just got the update today and boy am I disappointed. The graphics have improved and the colours really pop. The design of the areas are absolutely great as well. But after playing the game for almost 5 years as well I'm so disappointed by the fact that I have lost on so many things. Especially the lack of seconds in power ups and when the power ups are given. There is no use for them most of the time and you can no longer upgrade them as far as I am aware. I've been playing the game today a few times and I no longer feel the joy but irritated. I think I will be leaving the game with sadness because I always had so much joy playing with them minions. UPDATE: I decided to give it another try because sometimes it takes time to get used to changes but I'm still very disappointed. It seems there are more bugs, when I want to revive with watching an ad most of the time it tells me there was a failure so I cant. The other day I could play the seasonal challenge because it mysteriously disappeared. Furthermore I'm an adult so let me decide when I make use of a free revive or other "gift"! And where can I find the seasonal market??. To many flaws in a game I used to love so much

I remember playing it last time and coming back brings back memories!! Such a great idea of a game to be honest! However, I prefer the original one a lot more, where the aim is to run as far as you can. Ending a run right there when you complete a mission is so boring and it's a bit annoying. Perhaps you could still implement the missions feature into the long runs, and the missions automatically change after completing it while running!

star_4.text: I used to play this game on iOS back in early 2014 and Android a few years prior. I'd say the new update to this game is pretty good, but it might have a bit of a potential to be an incredible update to the entire game if they'd bring back one of the bosses from the previous versions of the game. For example, at times, you'd either face Vector, or Meena depending on the world, and you either had to survive or hit the smaller robots to beat them.

When I first downloaded this game it was fun and moderately challenging. However for over a year they've slowly removed easy access to tokens and it seems like they're trying to push it so that you're forced to 'pay to play'. I realize some people are more than happy to hand over money for fast high scores (and that companies will capitalize on that), but the game needs a less monetary method for players who don't pay.

There are both pros and cons to the new version. I like the new version because it is easier to earn tokens. The old version didn't have as many lags. In the game, there is an ad that stops a second before it says it will stop (toy brick crush or something like that), making you either press it to go to the play store, or close minion rush and have to wait three minutes to get back in the game, and that ad usually pops up when you press "watch ad to revive". I will rate 5 stars when it is fixed.

The new launch is decent. All my efforts, MONEY, time I spent upgrading costumes, skills, power ups, locales is gone. I loved the Special Missions, released routinely, and the Jelly Lab format--love them!!! The ability to use bananas as currency for certain prize pods is good. The game is a little overwhelming with so many activities to complete. Upgrades of costumes are not as good as prior versions.

About what you'd expect- it's a cute Minions themed runner game; you can have all different kinds of minions and there are missions and prizes. It's got the option to buy things but you don't have to pay to play. Graphics are good for what it is, music is the same theme from the movies. Thankful that it doesn't have ads after every single level, but it still has ads every couple of levels which isn't fantastic. Enjoyable game though.

Good game, fun to play when you're bored. But it has a lot of ads, now it's not like most games where an ad pops up every five seconds, but it has ads. Also, when you're actually controlling the minion running, you don't get to run for a very long time. The goals are normally, 'collect 10 bananas.' As you can imagine, pretty easy. I would like the challenges to be harder.

Haven't played this game for 2 years then started up again, it's still fun but i liked it better before the upgrade. I like that you can now access all the costumes through bannanas, don't like that they got rid of the separate power ups where you could level up the power ups on their own so now most power ups only last three seconds except for the one your wearing a costume for :/ Miss the puzzle pieces and Jelly Labs.

Loved this game since it came out, the new update was interesting to play but still enjoyed it and still play it to this day. My only problem is when I play it, it won't let my character tilt left or right motionally when riding on the slides. Idk if it's a problem with my phone or a glitch with the game. I have tried uninstalling it and redownloading too, it doesn't work. Otherwise, great game!

love this game, but ever since switching phones to pixel 10 pro xl, there are a lot of stutters and framerate issues. also, the game needs to compile shaders every time you open the app. did not used to do that.

I remember playing this game and it was so much fun as a kid. Though I have one question, did you remove bosses? I recalled a time when I was pretty sure there was one boss in this game and it was Vector. If so can you please add it back in a later update?
I love the new style and other stuff but I did like the more maps in the older version and its really laggy for a fire tablet (but I am blaming me for that)
It's clear to me that all the versions of Minion Rush are very impressive but not for the new one.
A nice and fast paced game.Although the boss battles being removed was a pity.

Older version had alot more features, however the new version has a better layout. if you get stuck on one task, you can try another and come back to it when you want to try again. I love the upgrades for the outfits, it is easier to get free items, and has a larger variety of places and tasks. I get why there are so many adverts, but wow, it gets tiring after a while when all adverts are 30 seconds long.

I like this game, but the issue is that I can't upgrade the freeze ray, its time is so much limited and it takes time to come across it in the game. The multiplier can't be upgraded to better duration during gameplay. it's boring guys. DO SOMETHING. in a game I work for many bananas only to be given a ⅛ of what I would have gained during the run. it requires internet to download some contents. it's not funny anymore.

its pretty good. I still love the game like i did as a child, but i do wish that the missions were longer. Even though there is a level where you can run as long as you want, it doesn't give any progress on the chapters. So i prefer for the missions to be harder and longer, even though this game is targeted for children. So in my opinion if i was still a child i would've wanted the missions to be longer. And the ads are okay, but it pops up too much. Maybe lay low on the amount of ads.
I love the game it's fun and challenging the only problem is to much ads

the ads, don't let me revive right even when I'm patient and wait for them to end, like they try to force me to play their demo. Then go straight to Google play instead of me being able to go back to Minion Rush and play or collect my rewards.
I really love this game so much even now I'm a teenager and I lost my 5 years old account and this is my childhood game 🎯

This game is good, especially since the new movie is coming out, it makes u wanna see it more! This game is like an advertisement to see the minions movies. The only annoying thing about the game is that it gets boring really easily. It might just be me, but overall it's really fun! I just think u should update it more often. Not saying u have to just saying u might wanna do it.

star_5.text: I have been playing this game since it's around 2013. It was so much better, you only had one character, and all you did was run and collect bananas. The upgrade was a little better. A free more Levels, events and power ups. They briefly has a versus mode on it, but it seemed to fall off after a short run. One complaint I have would be that I bought things like the ghost and the bride costumes and now they are now gone. Apparently they can change what they want, when they want. Like everyone ig.

I've been playing since day one and I still love it!!!! I did like the original version better than the updated version. With the original, you could run for 15+ minutes in a single run. After the updated version, it ends your run after a task is completed. They added a ton of variety... but at the loss of a "pure" running game. Perhaps they are trying to cover too many bases. I miss the marathon runs.

This game is a really good game and I really like it, and just wanted to ask you if you could add a multiplayer option, and here's what I think should be in the mode, first, you can join by a 4 letter code or get invited by email, 2, in multiplayer there are 2 modes, first is the race mode, in this you have to get to the finish first, second is the mission mode, you can help others with their missions, now time for the finale, 3, the lobby can have 2-8 players. That's all.

Great game with good graphics. It's more better playing on a mobile device than playing on a Apple TV. (yes, you can download games on it.) You get to unlock more items, characters, maps, etc. I just have a problem with one thing is that I get a lot of in-game notifications. Like, if I go to play a mission and then I come back to the menu after beating that mission, I get about like 5 notifications. I would just like for the notifications to just calm down.

One of the few games that I can play and never have the urge to spend real $$. There aren't many changes I would look for to make it better. Maybe make the free revives that can be earned optional on some missions. Kinda feels like a waste when they have to be used on the next mission whether you want them to or not. Still, the game is a lot of fun!!

An excellent runner that specializes more around completing missions. It's fun to see how costume upgrades can make missions that were impossible actually pretty easy. And with all the options for farming costume cards available, you'll always be working towards something that you'll use in the future, whether you know it or not. Casual players be warned however, this game can get incredibly difficult later on, even with the costume buffs given. No doubt the best runner game for advanced gamers.

Amazing game with tons of fun and different characters straight from the movies! They have fun animations and abilities that never get old or boring. I love the references and missions, they provide for hours of fun and challenges. The game could use a bit of work in terms of some characters being useless for some missions. Other than that, this game is great!

I absolutely love this game. I have been playing it now for awhile and I absolutely love it. I used to play when I was younger when it was an endless runner game. There are quests that you vcan complete now too. The only bad part is that completeing the quest automaticly ends your run and the possible bananas that you can earn. On top of that everytime a quest finishes an ad starts. Maybe something to look into for the future.

I LOVE this game. Minions is one of the very best. There is a couple of things I'd like to see change because not everyone is good at near misses. Provide the option to select another challenge if you fail, keep failing the current challenge. Also. developers, PLEASE OPEN other Minions for Rocket and the Moon. I had nearly every Minion in the previous version so a little frustrating to never get the cards to get Minions for additional rocket and moon. Regardeless, this app is LOTS of daily fun.

This is faced paced running with obsracles at every turn. To get the fruit quicker, go after the minions. Thought it was impossible to get the Gru coins without paying real money, but then got all fruit on level and as I kept going a Gru coin showed up. Yay! Its an addictive fun game for all ages. My daughter's 7 and 9 love it as well as me, Mom and Im 44.

just started playing again recently since my childhood. Love it! I can collect so many minion characters by collecting stickers, and the game is more fun now with multiple map selections. Also, I can remove pop up ads forever with only cheap price but also got an epic kevin tracksuit minion as well! So cute! There's also free common pigtails minion that I can get with spinwheel by watching ads (which I don't mind). Overall such a wholesome nostalgic experience, thank you so much gameloft!

Just joined back today. I remember playing this back in 2017 I think. After the current update (97 I believe), this brung back the nostalgia! I thought 2025 was supposed to be the year where everything gets reworked, but nope! Y'all made it happen in 2026! I am very proud to see this game back in action! The fact that this was done at the end of the month, on exactly the last day, makes this even more spectacular! Keep cooking Gameloft! Y'all did it! 🔥💪😎

I haven't played this game since early 2018. Now coming back, this game is better than what I was expecting. You can actually obtain costumes without spending a lot of money, and the gameplay is the same as I remember. There's a lot room for improvement, but I like where this game is going.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Fantastic game! Minion Rush is super fun, smooth, and very addictive. I love the colorful graphics and fast-paced gameplay. It runs perfectly on my Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra, with no lag at all. I enjoy it so much and always come back to play. Highly recommended for Minions fans!

new Feedback: hey the new Update makes the game unique and all with the Free run. but The sound and music is a little too much. by that it Always restarts when I go to a different section of the game and when I use a power up at the beginning it Mutes the music so I can't hear it for the rest of the gameplay unless I fiddle with the volume of the game or Exit the app and come back. plz fix it!

i love that this game went back to the infinite runner style. the level system was terrible. i just wish a few of the coolest features from back then came back. like the entire beach map is missing as far as i can see, the maps are more simple than they were with less charm than they had to. for example grus lab has no images of his "kids" anymore, only showing generic minion images (generic fits the new style in general) also the old item were cooler running on moon > invincibility shoes
This is the best game ever! but it contains ads but it's alright! it's the best game ever I like bananas. And I run super fast LOL
A nostalgic endless runner that is truly remarkable and hilarious. Despicable Me fans, this is for you.
because minions are the best but make other games. other minions

This game is really addictive,I keep thinking just one more go, and im still playing a hour later, really great game for a freebie, love the minion noises and giggles, I still haven't managed to run more than four mins, so I will have to keep trying. I have carried on, it is still addictive, it has upgraded loads of times, the upgrades are v good, the only thing I don't like is if you have extra lives, it automatically uses them, doesn't give u a choice,
